_what: General, relative strategy rules. NO holdings, NO dollar amounts — the app owns all live numbers per portfolio and computes dollars. Goal: grow, lower avg cost, limit downside, compound.

globals._explain: Big-brother: every signal includes a plain-language reason (use OpenRouter AI to phrase).
globals._news: Fold the app's existing AI news scan into signals as volatility heads-ups.

liquidBasket._use: BTC / ETH / SOL / XAUT(gold). The rebalanced vol-harvest engine.
liquidBasket.targetWeights: equal by default (1/N each); app stores per-portfolio overrides
liquidBasket._gold_note: XAUT is a full basket member — ballast that funds crypto dip-buying in crashes.

rebalance._model: ASYMMETRIC — buy dips fast, trim winners slow.

buyDip.cadence: continuous (any time, as often as it happens)
buyDip.action: buy back up to target — catch every dip, lowers avg cost
buyDip._cashFloor: Never spend below 10% of portfolio value in cash. Only cash above the floor is spendable. If capped, signal shows ideal gap and explains the cap.

trimWinner.action: trim back toward target — patient, never choke a runner

skimOnPump.trigger: asset up 20% from last action AND above avg cost
skimOnPump.cadence: each fresh +20% leg (skim, reset reference, watch for the next)
skimOnPump.action: book a little cash, let the other 95% ride
skimOnPump._why: User's call: book profit on a real 20% pop. Costs some upside vs waiting for 40%, but banks ~$2k/yr cash and the user will actually follow it.

crashBrake._note: OFF for the Growth dial (max return). Turn on for the calmer dial.

microcap._use: AQUARI etc. Too illiquid to rebalance — liquidity-aware SELL calculator instead.
microcap._clip: Suggested sell = largest size keeping price impact < maxSlippagePct (constant-product on live pool reserves), capped at volumeCapPct × today's volume. Always shown with reasoning.

dataSources._rule: Use free sources first. If the app wants a paid/keyed API for exact quotes, it ASKS the user before using it.

general.relative: All weights/bands are percentages; app multiplies by each portfolio's real capital.
general.multiPortfolio: Each portfolio independent, any mix, any size.
general.addingMoney: New money enters at target weights; everything recomputes. No size limit anywhere.
general.appOwnsData: Portfolios, capital, holdings, weights all live in the app (its own screens), NOT here.

backtest.config: equal 25% BTC/ETH/SOL/XAUT; buy dips fast at -10% below target; trim slow monthly at +20% above target; skim 5% per +20% leg
backtest.caveat: Holding wins the rare monster-bull year (uncapped). Strategy wins the typical year. Monthly gold interpolated; one cycle.

horizon: ~1 year (optimized and reported on 1-year rolling windows)

safetyGuards._use: Money-math safety layer — catches bad numbers before they reach the user.
safetyGuards._fillJump: Flag when a settings save changes holdings or avg cost by >30% — typo guard.
safetyGuards._avgCost: Flag when avg cost is >50% off the live price — sanity check.
safetyGuards.signalValidation: Every signal's dollar amount must be finite, non-negative, within spendable cash (buys), within holdings (sells), and within portfolio value. Failures are suppressed, logged, and surfaced.
safetyGuards.auditLog: Every signal (sent or suppressed) is durably logged with timestamp, portfolio, asset, action, amount, price, freshness, reason, and status.
